steps.title: Set up the total cost expression
steps.content:
Shirts cost \$18 each and pants cost \$28 each. If Jordan buys s shirts and p pairs of pants, the total spent is:
$$18s + 28p$$

steps.title: Translate the spending constraint
steps.content:
Jordan can spend at most \$132. The phrase at most means the total spending cannot exceed \$132, which translates to $\le$:
$$18s + 28p \le 132$$
That confirms A is correct.
